title: Classic German Beef Casserole
description: A hearty German-inspired casserole filled with tender beef and topped with a crispy crust. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Cook the ground beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onion, mushrooms, tomato paste, and flour to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the beef broth and milk, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted.
Prepare the casserole crust according to package instructions.
Transfer the beef mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with the casserole crust.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
